schema.description: Request body for updating company payment configs. At least one of payment_speed, fast_payment_limit, or partner_owned_disbursement is required.

payment_speed.description: Desired payment speed. 1-day is only applicable to partners that opt in.

fast_payment_limit.description: Payment limit for 1-day or 2-day payroll (in dollars).

partner_owned_disbursement.description: Whether to use the partner-owned disbursement payment rail.

schema.title: Payment-Configs-Update-Request
